stockMarket.summary: Global stock markets are tumbling following President Trump's address on the US-Iran conflict, which hinted at escalation. Energy markets are witnessing a sharp surge, while equities across Asia and Europe have faced significant declines.
notableMoves: Oil surge: Brent crude up ~7.6% to ~$108.81/bbl, WTI up ~7.1% to ~$107.18/bbl.
Market sentiment: U.S. stock futures (S&P 500, Nasdaq) lower; Asian and European indices closed/trading in the red.
Treasuries: 10-year Treasury yield rose to ~4.37% amid flight to safety/uncertainty.

events: Major Recovery: Priceless 2,500-year-old golden helmet stolen from Dutch museum in 2025 recovered.
Tokyo Contemporary Art Award 2026-2028: Recipients Han Ishu and yang02 announced.
trends: Ongoing focus on figurative art as collectors prioritize recognizable yet evolving narratives.
Significant spring exhibition cycle underway with major retrospectives (e.g., Duchamp at MoMA, Whitney Biennial).
